rationale.fidelity: Correctly assigns binary pre-shift inclusion, fixed shelf and pick-slot constraints, uncertain arrivals and choices, substitution, and expected contribution margin.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly identifies the actor, cutoff, breadth-versus-capacity trade-off, modeled substitution pathway, and feasible alternative assortments.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Scholarly positioning is not requested or claimed, and no novelty claim is introduced.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels substitution as modeled, uses a synthetic setting, and rejects unsupported firm, delivery-speed, realized-profit, and welfare effects.
rationale.prose_clarity: Readable and organized, though the canvas-and-gates format is longer and more technical than needed.
rationale.overall: A comprehensive, model-faithful framing with excellent claim boundaries and no hard failure.
